testcase.classname: End to End Bus Ticket Booking on RedBus Website
testcase.name: Positive TC_04 (E2E) - User books a bus ticket successfully - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given The user is on RedBus website.........................................passed When User enters source city and click in the dropdown option...............passed And User enters destination city and click in the dropdown option...........passed And User clicks date option and selects the journey date....................passed And User toggles Booking for women toggle and closes the pop up.............passed Then User clicks - search button............................................passed Then The list of available buses should be displayed........................passed When User clicks - multiple filters like Primo Bus, Single Seats and AC.....passed And User clicks - Free Cancellation banner filter...........................passed And User clicks - Special bus features filter button and clicks the Free date change option.passed Then All the selected filters are applied in the search list................passed When User selects a bus using view seats button.............................passed And User selects an available seat..........................................passed And User clicks - Select boarding & dropping point button...................passed And User selects boarding point and dropping point..........................passed And User enters contact details like Phone number, Email ID and State of Residence.passed And User enters passenger details like Name "Preshika", Age "21" and Gender "Female".passed And User clicks - Dont add Free Cancellation checkbox.......................passed And User clicks - Dont add Redbus Assurance checkbox........................passed And User clicks - Continue booking button...................................passed Then User is navigated to the Payment page..................................passed When User clicks - Add credit/debit card button.............................passed And User enters card number, card holder name, expiry date and cvv..........passed

testcase.name: Negative TC_03 - To validate error messages for missing card details on the Payment page - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given The user is on RedBus website.........................................passed When User enters source city and click in the dropdown option...............passed And User enters destination city and click in the dropdown option...........passed And User clicks date option and selects the journey date....................passed And User toggles Booking for women toggle and closes the pop up.............passed Then User clicks - search button............................................passed When User clicks - multiple filters like Primo Bus, Single Seats and AC.....passed And User clicks - Free Cancellation banner filter...........................passed And User selects a bus using view seats button..............................passed And User selects an available seat..........................................passed And User clicks - Select boarding & dropping point button...................passed And User selects boarding point and dropping point..........................passed And User enters contact details like Phone number, Email ID and State of Residence.passed And User enters passenger details like Name "Preshika", Age "21" and Gender "Female".passed And User clicks - Dont add Free Cancellation checkbox.......................passed And User clicks - Dont add Redbus Assurance checkbox........................passed And User clicks - Continue booking button...................................passed Then User is navigated to the Payment page..................................passed When User clicks - Add credit/debit card button.............................passed Then User clicks - Pay amount button........................................passed Then The respective error messages for card number "Enter valid card number", card name "Please enter valid card holder name", expiry date "Please enter valid expiry year" and cvv "Please enter valid cvv" must be displayed in the payment page.passed

testcase.name: Positive TC_01 - To validate busname, boarding point and dropping point in Payment page - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given The user is on RedBus website.........................................passed When User enters source city and click in the dropdown option...............passed And User enters destination city and click in the dropdown option...........passed And User clicks date option and selects the journey date....................passed And User toggles Booking for women toggle and closes the pop up.............passed Then User clicks - search button............................................passed When User clicks - multiple filters like Primo Bus, Single Seats and AC.....passed And User clicks - Free Cancellation banner filter...........................passed And User selects a bus using view seats button..............................passed And User selects an available seat..........................................passed And User clicks - Select boarding & dropping point button...................passed And User selects boarding point and dropping point..........................passed And User enters contact details like Phone number, Email ID and State of Residence.passed And User enters passenger details like Name "Preshika", Age "21" and Gender "Female".passed And User clicks - Dont add Free Cancellation checkbox.......................passed And User clicks - Dont add Redbus Assurance checkbox........................passed And User clicks - Continue booking button...................................passed Then User is navigated to the Payment page..................................passed Then The selected bus name, boarding and dropping points must be displayed correctly on the Payment page.passed

testcase.name: Positive TC_02 - To validate that the correct total amount displayed in the Payment page - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given The user is on RedBus website.........................................passed When User enters source city and click in the dropdown option...............passed And User enters destination city and click in the dropdown option...........passed And User clicks date option and selects the journey date....................passed And User toggles Booking for women toggle and closes the pop up.............passed Then User clicks - search button............................................passed When User clicks - multiple filters like Primo Bus, Single Seats and AC.....passed And User clicks - Free Cancellation banner filter...........................passed And User selects a bus using view seats button..............................passed And User selects an available seat..........................................passed And User clicks - Select boarding & dropping point button...................passed And User selects boarding point and dropping point..........................passed And User enters contact details like Phone number, Email ID and State of Residence.passed And User enters passenger details like Name "Preshika", Age "21" and Gender "Female".passed And User clicks - Dont add Free Cancellation checkbox.......................passed And User clicks - Dont add Redbus Assurance checkbox........................passed And User clicks - Continue booking button...................................passed Then User is navigated to the Payment page..................................passed Then The correct total amount must be displayed in the Payment page.........passed
